extracted.title: CAPACITY REDUCTION Michigan Leg North – Blue Lake Injection
extracted.description:
ANR is restricting capacity in the Michigan Leg North area at the Blue Lake Injection location. As a result, capacity will be reduced as follows:

4/21 (Intraday) Blue Lake - Injection (LOC #542526): No incremental volumes will be scheduled
4/22 – 5/4 Blue Lake - Injection (LOC #542526): Firm Primary Only will be scheduled

ANR anticipates this posting may result in Firm Secondary and Interruptible curtailments.

Please direct any questions to your Account Coordinator, Customer Service Representative, or the Nominations and Scheduling hotline @ 800-827-5267
